_comment: Project-local credentials for MaidsClaw providers. Copy to config/auth.json and fill in real values. This file is gitignored.

credentials._comment_1: Tier B: Kimi for Coding API key — subscription-based (replaces KIMI_CODING_API_KEY env var)

credentials._comment_1b: Tier B: Moonshot Platform metered API key — pay-per-token (replaces MOONSHOT_API_KEY env var)

credentials._comment_2: Tier B: MiniMax API key (replaces MINIMAX_API_KEY env var)

credentials._comment_3: Tier C: OpenAI ChatGPT Codex OAuth token (manually obtained from Codex CLI login). HIGH RISK: undocumented endpoint.

credentials._comment_4: Tier C: Anthropic Claude Pro/Max OAuth via setup-token (run 'claude setup-token' to obtain). HIGH RISK: may violate Anthropic ToS.

gateway._comment: Gateway bearer tokens for cockpit routes. Keep separate from provider credentials[].
